title: Payment Gateway
excerpt: We are looking at integrating Monday to an international FX payment gateway

posts.author: daniellam2519 (daniella@stylenations.com)
posts.cookedHtml: We are looking at integrating Monday to an international FX payment gateway

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Daniella,

If you’re interested in integrating with 3rd party system, we encourage you to look into Zapier or Make - the 3rd party tools to choose would be dependent on the payment gateway software you’re using

posts.author: denlunev (Denis Lunev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team actually have been working on a payment integration for Monday that might be what you’re looking for.
It allows you to handle payments (Stripe/PayPal/Authorize net) directly within Monday, there is a ability to create payment forms or invoices.

I recently put together a video that explains how it works — if you’re interested, you can check it out here: Payments for Monday

Let me know if you have any questions or want more details!

posts.author: Surexama (Surexama)
posts.cookedHtml: I ended up creating a custom form with status updates and automations tied to a board, then handled payments using an external link. Not perfect, but works fine for now.

posts.author: Surexama (Surexama)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve heard good things about Antom for setups like that, especially if you’re trying to connect project tools with international payment gateways. Someone I worked with used it to simplify complex payment setups for their cross-border transactions, and they said it cut down a lot of manual work. I’ve been thinking about testing it myself since it seems to handle different currencies and providers without needing a bunch of separate integrations.
